mapper.select: SELECT s.schedule_date , count(s.id) all_seats, ( SELECT count(ss.id) from photographer pp, photographer_schedule ss where pp.id = ss.ph_id and pp.city = #{city} and pp.go_live = 'Y' and ss.schedule_date like concat('%', #{yyyyMM} ,'%') and ss.schedule_date = s.schedule_date and ss.active = 'N' group by ss.schedule_date ) reserved_seats from photographer p, photographer_schedule s where p.id = s.ph_id and p.city = #{city} and p.go_live = 'Y' and s.schedule_date like concat('%', #{yyyyMM} ,'%') group by s.schedule_date ORDER BY s.schedule_date

select p.id pid, ph_uuid, p.name, p.nick_name, p.phone, p.go_live, s.id, s.schedule_date, s.slot_start_label, s.slot_end_label, s.active from photographer p, photographer_schedule s where p.id = s.ph_id and p.go_live = 'Y' and p.city = #{city} and s.schedule_date = #{scheduleDate} ORDER by s.active desc

select p.id pid, ph_uuid, p.name, p.nick_name, p.phone, p.go_live, s.id, s.schedule_date, s.slot_start_label, s.slot_end_label, s.active from photographer p, photographer_schedule s where p.id = s.ph_id and p.id = #{phId} and str_to_date( s.schedule_date, "%Y/%m/%d") >= str_to_date( #{today}, '%Y/%m/%d') and str_to_date( s.schedule_date, "%Y/%m/%d") <= str_to_date( #{endDate}, '%Y/%m/%d') ORDER by s.schedule_date
mapper.insert:
insert into photographer_schedule (ph_id, schedule_date, slot_start, slot_end, min_value, max_value, slot_start_label, slot_end_label) values
(#{schedule.phId}, #{schedule.scheduleDate}, #{schedule.slotStart}, #{schedule.slotEnd}, #{schedule.minValue}, #{schedule.maxValue}, #{schedule.slotStartLabel}, #{schedule.slotEndLabel})
